rationale: Domestic-entity convention — the entity's Maine-registered name. Distinct from `entity.home_jurisdiction_name` (foreign-only).

label_verbatim: SECOND: Original date of filing with Secretary of States Office
rationale: Date the entity was originally formed in Maine (pre-dissolution). New canonical key — see schema_gaps.

label_verbatim: THIRD A: Domestic Nonprofit Corporation (13-B MRSA §1117)
THIRD C: Domestic Limited Liability Company (31 MRSA §1604)
THIRD B: Domestic Business Corporation (13-C MRSA §1425)
THIRD D: Domestic Limited Partnership (31 MRSA §1401-A)

rationale: Name of the clerk/registered agent on record at the time of dissolution. y=256 widget in the FOURTH section (top line of FOURTH). Distinct from `clerk_change.*` and `registered_agent.*` because this is a historical-record reference, not a current/new appointment.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: (street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Single combined-line address of the clerk/registered agent on record at dissolution. y=211 widget (bottom line of FOURTH). Form does not split street from city/state/zip.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: The purpose or purposes for which this revival is requested (line 1)
rationale: FIFTH section line 1 of 4. y=153. Multi-line free-text key — synth concatenates with newline separators across Text5/Text8/Text11/Text10.
FIFTH section line 4 of 4. y=82 (bottom of page 1).

label_verbatim: SIXTH: Time period needed to complete the purpose(s) specified in item fifth
rationale: Duration string (e.g., '2 years' or 'through Dec 31 2027'). Free text — form gives no format guidance.

label_verbatim: SEVENTH: (type or print name) [Row 1, left column]
rationale: First requesting party's name. Indexed-roster pattern (matches `incorporator_N.printed_name` from MBCA-6).

label_verbatim: SEVENTH: (type or print name) [Row 2, left column]
SEVENTH: (type or print name) [Row 3, left column]
rationale: Third requesting party (form caps inline at 3).
Street address paired with Text13 (same y row).

Shape B — printed name only. The signature line itself ('(signature of any duly authorized person)') has no AcroForm widget; intended as wet-ink. Capacity ('any duly authorized person') is fixed by form text and not captured per-signer.
